message:
Enhance database layer with comprehensive test coverage

This commit expands the database layer with additional query capabilities
and significantly increases test coverage from 62% toward the 90% target.

## Production Code Changes

### requests.go
- Add ListPendingRequestsByProjects(): Query pending requests across multiple
  project paths for cross-project review pool support
- Add SearchRequestsByCommand(): Full-text search on command content
- Add GetRequestsByStatus(): Filter requests by status with pagination
- Improve error messages with more context for debugging

### types.go
- Update RiskTier type documentation with tier definitions
- Add JSON tags for API serialization consistency

## Test Coverage Additions

### db_test.go (+213 lines)
- TestSchemaCreation: Verify all tables and indexes created correctly
- TestFTSTriggersUpdateSearch: Full-text search trigger validation
- TestPartialUniqueIndex: Unique constraint on active sessions
- TestConcurrentWrites: Race condition testing with goroutines
- TestMigrationIdempotency: Schema can be applied multiple times safely
- TestConnectionPooling: Multiple concurrent connections work correctly

### requests_test.go (+410 lines)
- TestCreateRequest: Basic request creation with all fields
- TestCreateRequestWithSensitiveData: Redacted command handling
- TestGetRequestNotFound: Proper error on missing request
- TestListPendingRequests: Pagination and filtering
- TestListPendingRequestsByProjects: Cross-project query
- TestUpdateRequestStatus: State transitions
- TestRequestExpiry: TTL and expiration handling
- TestSearchRequestsByCommand: FTS query behavior
- TestGetRequestsByRiskTier: Tier-based filtering

### sessions_test.go (+205 lines)
- TestCreateSession: Session creation with HMAC key generation
- TestActiveSessionUniqueness: One active session per agent+project
- TestSessionHeartbeat: last_active_at updates
- TestEndSession: Proper session termination
- TestFindStaleSessions: Stale session detection
- TestListActiveSessionsWithDifferentModel: Different-model reviewer queries
- TestGetDifferentModelStatus: Model availability checks

### reviews_test.go (+216 lines)
- TestCreateReview: Basic review creation
- TestCreateReviewSelfReviewPrevention: Cannot approve own requests
- TestCreateReviewSameModelRestriction: Different-model enforcement
- TestListReviewsForRequest: Review history queries
- TestReviewQuorumCalculation: Approval counting logic
- TestReviewCommentValidation: Comment length limits

### outcomes_test.go (+187 lines)
- TestRecordExecutionOutcome: Successful execution logging
- TestRecordExecutionFailure: Failure with error details
- TestRecordRollback: Rollback tracking
- TestGetOutcomeHistory: Execution history queries
- TestOutcomeWithGitMetadata: Git commit SHA tracking

## Test Characteristics

All tests follow SLB testing philosophy:
- Use real SQLite databases (no mocks)
- Table-driven test structure for clarity
- Isolated test environments with t.TempDir()
- Deterministic and fast (<1s for full suite)
- Race detector compatible (-race flag)

These tests catch real database behavior including constraint violations,
transaction semantics, and concurrent access patterns.
